footer.description: I build modern web applications focused on performance, clean code and great user experience.

about.bio: Developer from the Czech Republic, building websites since I was 17. Focused on React, Next.js and modern frontend. Starting September 2026 I'm studying electrical engineering — but I'm not leaving code behind.
about.factsHint: Click a card to find out more

facts.f1: I've been building websites since 17 — started with HTML & CSS and was instantly fascinated that I could create things visible to the whole world
facts.f2: Gaming is how I recharge from coding. My best ideas come right after a gaming session
facts.f3: I'm most productive after midnight when it's quiet and nothing interrupts me
facts.f4: After leaving school I took some time off, then dove fully into improving my web dev skills. Starting in September I'm studying electrical engineering, mainly for the diploma
facts.f5: Personal debugging record: 6 hours over a missing semicolon. Never skipping one again
facts.f6: Open source is my way of giving back to the community that taught me how to code
facts.f7: I've also built plugins for CS 1.6 and CS2, and ran my own gaming portals hawkband.eu and gamerzpro.cz for years
facts.f8: I used to run a Minecraft server too, but the community eventually died out so it wasn't worth keeping it funded
facts.f9: For my first 6 months I learned by tearing apart other people's websites in DevTools — Inspect Element was my first textbook

about.timelineHint: Where I came from and where I'm headed

t1.title: Born
t1.desc: I had no idea that one day I'd be building websites people actually use.

t2.title: First line of code
t2.desc: HTML and CSS — I was instantly hooked. While others were bored, I was figuring out how to animate a button.

t3.title: Started IT school
t3.desc: Enrolled in a technical IT program. JavaScript, React, my first dynamic projects.

t4.title: Coding alongside school
t4.desc: Kept building my own web projects alongside my studies, getting better with every one.

t5.title: Moving & leaving IT school
t5.desc: Had to leave my IT program after moving. I took some time off, then dove fully into improving my web dev skills.

t6.title: Starting electrical engineering
t6.desc: Starting in September, I'm beginning an electrical engineering program, mainly for the diploma. Still coding and building websites on my own alongside it.

t7.title: firefoxx.online
t7.desc: Launched my own portfolio. This website is living proof of how far I've come.

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.subtitle: This page is being built. In the meantime, feel free to reach out directly.
